heading: Resource conservation and development program
label: 3452 Resource conservation and development program
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3452, , , , related to definitions, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 97–98, title XV, § 152995 Stat. 1337Pub. L. 107–171Dec. 22, 1981

children.text: to conserve and improve the use of land, develop natural resources, and improve and enhance the social, economic, and environmental conditions in primarily rural areas of the United States; and
to encourage and improve the capability of State, units of government, Indian tribes, nonprofit organizations, and councils to carry out the purposes described in paragraph (1).1So in original.1
